ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity (country) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the entity */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the entity belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion to which the entity belongs */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita (for economic context) */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Human Development Index (HDI) (for social context) */,
  "political_stability_index" REAL /* Political Stability Index (for political context) */,
  "corruption_perception_index" REAL /* Corruption Perception Index (CPI) (for governance context) */,
  "trade_policy_type" TEXT /* Type of trade policy (e.g., free trade, protectionist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year recorded */,
  "global_economic_conditions" TEXT /* Global economic conditions (e.g., recession, boom) */,
  "major_events" TEXT /* Major global events (e.g., oil crisis, cold war) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (for device and browser information) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Region to which the entity belongs
Subregion to which the entity belongs
Type of trade policy (e.g., free trade, protectionist)
Major global events (e.g., oil crisis, cold war)
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Department or team to which the user belongs
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the trade data being accessed
ID of the user accessing the data
Date when the data was accessed
User agent string (for device and browser information)
Duration of the session in minutes
